description_for_human: Scan any URL for API security vulnerabilities in 60 seconds.
description_for_model: External API security scanner. Use this to check if a website or API has security vulnerabilities including missing security headers, SSL issues, CORS misconfigurations, exposed API keys, and more. Input a URL, get back a security score (0-100), grade (A-F), and list of findings with severity levels and fix recommendations. No authentication required for basic scans.
